title: [question] To use buildah as a package in go, is the dependency requires only on develop computer or requires on user's computer too?
body:
I found [04-include-in-your-build-tool.md](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/docs/tutorials/04-include-in-your-build-tool.md), which is exactly what I need. but I found that:

> Bootstrap the project and install the dependencies

I have to know that are those dependencies required only on my own development computer or also required on user's computer?

comments.body: There only required to build/compile the application.  They should not be needed by users of your application.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
